products.name: Haven Control Room
products.description: The central platform for cataloging No Man's Sky exploration. Galaxy maps, system records, planet surveys, fauna sightings — all gathered in one place by the people who found them.

products.name: Haven Extractor
products.description: A companion tool that captures discoveries directly from the game and submits them to Haven automatically. Built for Travelers who'd rather explore than transcribe.

products.name: Travelers Collective
products.description: Haven's central exploration database. Everything our community has witnessed, organized and cross-referenced. Built to grow as Travelers grow.

products.name: Travelers Exchange
products.description: A cross-community economy where contribution earns currency, and currency moves between businesses run by members. Currently being reshaped after community feedback.

products.name: Keeper
products.description: A Discord companion built by Stars that bridges the platform and the community — tracking contributions, awarding XP, and giving console players a way to engage without leaving Discord.

products.name: Viobot
products.description: A Discord moderation bot built and maintained by art3mis and Goat from the IEA community. Given to us as a side project — we host it, they look after it.
